entity_proposals.description: A conceptual framework encompassing various mathematical methods and techniques related to Krylov subspaces used in numerical linear algebra.
entity_proposals.justification: This new class is necessary to specifically represent the unique properties and applications of Krylov subspaces, which are not adequately covered by existing classes, ensuring that future related concepts can be categorized appropriately.
